overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage following a character through a post-apocalyptic urban waterfront. The character walks along ruined streets and a wooden bridge past abandoned vehicles and industrial ruins under a hazy, warm-lit sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: ruined waterfront promenade with abandoned vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the stone path beside the water, passing an abandoned fire truck

entered.detail: black iron fence with chain links along the water edge
damaged multi-story buildings with broken windows and faded facades
abandoned red fire truck parked on the street
large industrial buildings with tall smokestacks visible in the hazy distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a stone waterfront path bordered by an iron fence on the right and ruined buildings on the left. An abandoned red fire truck sits parked on the street as the character approaches a traffic light, with industrial smokestacks visible in the distant haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden footbridge crossing over stagnant water

events.description: path surface changes from stone tiles to wooden planks as character enters bridge section

agents.ego_description: crossing the wooden bridge over the stagnant green water

entered.detail: weathered wooden plank walkway with wooden post railings
greenish stagnant water visible between bridge planks and beneath the railing

segments.scene_description: The character transitions onto a wooden footbridge spanning stagnant water, leaving the stone promenade behind. The wooden planks and railings replace the iron fence, while the ruined buildings remain visible on the left and the industrial complex looms ahead.

events.description: exits wooden bridge onto broken asphalt and concrete rubble

agents.ego_description: navigating through rubble and broken pavement toward the industrial buildings

entered.detail: piles of broken concrete slabs and debris scattered across the path
rusted abandoned vehicles parked near the industrial buildings

segments.scene_description: Leaving the wooden bridge, the character walks through a landscape of broken asphalt and concrete rubble. Abandoned cars become visible in the distance near the industrial complex, while the iron fence continues along the right side closer to the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway overlooking abandoned industrial parking lot

events.description: path curves right approaching an overlook of the parking lot below

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated edge overlooking the parking lot, approaching the main industrial complex

entered.detail: black metal railing along the elevated path edge overlooking the lower area

segments.scene_description: The character follows a curving elevated path with a metal railing, overlooking a parking lot filled with abandoned vehicles below. The industrial complex draws closer, dominating the view ahead as the waterfront fence and rubble fall behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a ruined waterfront that transitions from a stone promenade into a dense industrial wasteland. It begins with the character walking past an abandoned red fire truck and ruined buildings, with distant smokestacks looming through a hazy sky. As the character moves forward, the stone path gives way to a wooden footbridge spanning stagnant water, shifting the surroundings from urban ruins to a fragile crossing. The scene then opens onto a landscape of broken asphalt and concrete rubble, where abandoned cars appear in the distance as the character leaves the bridge behind. Finally, the path curves onto an elevated walkway with metal railings, overlooking a parking lot of derelict vehicles as the massive industrial complex dominates the horizon.
